concerns.analysis: The sidebar box on page 2 of the source PDF, which discusses free awareness videos and webcasts from The SANS Institute, is completely missing from the output. This box contains significant content including introductory text and two URLs (https://securingthehuman.sans.org/resources/votm and https://www.sans.org/webcasts/upcoming).

concerns.analysis: The layout of the first page is significantly altered. In the source PDF, the NC logo is at the top left as a header element, and thematic images (ATM photo, Spy graphic) are placed adjacent to their respective text sections. In the HTML output, these images and the logo are moved and clustered together in a vertical stack after the text of the first two articles, separating the visual context from the related text. This represents a failure in visual organization of information.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 1 shows NC logo in top header, ATM image next to ATM text, and Spy image next to Inside Threat text.
concerns.output_quote: The NC logo, ATM image, and Spy image are all clustered together at the end of the 'Threat from Inside' section, after both text blocks.

concerns.analysis: The output fails to include almost all URLs and email links present in the source document. In several paragraphs, the text abruptly stops where a link or email address should be. Specifically, the link for the ATM article on page 1 is missing, all newsletter links on page 2 are missing, the 'Useful Links' section on page 3 contains only headings without the corresponding URLs, and all contact/resource links on page 5 are absent.
